scripts.build: bun run --filter @chriscode/hush build && (cd docs && bun x astro build)
scripts.dev: bun run --filter @chriscode/hush dev && (cd docs && bun x astro dev)
scripts.docs:dev: cd docs && bun x astro dev
scripts.docs:build: cd docs && bun x astro build
scripts.docs:preview: cd docs && bun x astro preview
scripts.docs:deploy: cd docs && bun x astro build && bun run deploy
